positive: A mesmerizing, highly stylized celestial garden scene. The composition features interlocking patterns of stylized constellations forming the silhouette of giant, blooming geometric lotus flowers. Incorporate deep indigo and cosmic teal hues contrasted with radiant pops of gold and ethereal lavender. The flora elements should appear as delicate, sharp linework against a deep gradient background. The style must be a mix of psychedelic geometry and sacred geometry art, rendered with extreme graphic quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, strong symmetry, high contrast, minimalist yet richly detailed.
negative: artifacts, blurry, grainy, watermark, text, low detail, signature, poorly drawn, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, childish
